MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-16-2021 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-10-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of And Motion To Deem Facts As Admitted, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Support Declaration
Off Calendar Dec-09-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK's Motion To Deem Facts As Admitted.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear. There being no appearances made in this matter, the Court rules as follows: The motion is denied without prejudice. Moving party's RFAs were not attached to declaration in support of the motion.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
